description: Forge daemon operator dashboard — P3-3 Stage 4 (2C-1). Surfaces 5 metric families: phase duration, phase persistence error rate, table rows, layer freshness, bench composite trend. PromQL expressions target the names emitted by `crates/daemon/src/server/metrics.rs`. Bench trend panel queries the daemon's SQLite kpi_events table via `forge-bench`'s telemetry path (or the /inspect bench_run_summary shape from Tier 3); for Grafana use, point an SQLite/Postgres datasource at the kpi_events table or extend the daemon with a Prometheus exporter for bench composites.

panels.title: Phase duration p95 (by phase_name + outcome)
panels.description: p95 latency per consolidator phase, split by outcome (success/error). Sourced from `forge_phase_duration_seconds` histogram. A spike in `error` outcome durations is a strong signal for a stuck-phase regression.

panels.title: Phase persistence error rate (per second)
panels.description: Rate of `forge_phase_persistence_errors_total` increments per phase per error_kind. Sustained non-zero rate indicates a broken phase. Acceptable ceiling per ops SLO: < 0.01/s steady-state.

panels.title: Phase output rows total (cumulative)
panels.description: Throughput of consolidator phase outputs. Drop to 0 = phase stuck. Matches `forge_phase_output_rows_total` counter.

panels.title: Table rows (gauge, by table)
panels.description: Row counts per table, refreshed periodically by the daemon's gauge-refresh worker. Sudden drop = unexpected DELETE / migration regression. Sustained flatline on `memory` = indexer stalled.

panels.title: Layer freshness (seconds since last write, by layer)
panels.description: Seconds since the last write/touch per Manas layer (skill, perception, declared, etc.). Rising monotonically beyond ~3600s = layer is not being updated. Spec source: 2A-4d.2 T4 GaugeSnapshot swap (`crates/daemon/src/server/metrics.rs:258`).

panels.title: Bench composite trend — last 7 days

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.bench_name') AS bench, json_extract(metadata_json, '$.composite') AS composite FROM kpi_events WHERE event_type = 'bench_run_completed' AND timestamp > datetime('now', '-7 days') ORDER BY timestamp ASC

panels.description: Composite score over time per bench. Source: `kpi_events` table where `event_type='bench_run_completed'` (Tier 3 §3.2 contract). Requires an SQLite datasource pointing at the daemon DB OR an extracted Prometheus exporter — see `docs/observability/grafana-operator-dashboard.md` for setup. v1 displays a static query; v2 may add the same surface as a Prometheus gauge if continuous polling proves preferable.

title: Forge Daemon — Operator (P3-3 2C-1)
